test.name: TC-001 เปิดเว็บไซต์และLogin

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เข้าสู่ระบบ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//a[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//a[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'preeya.k@gmail.com' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'อีเมล')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'Preeya20242024' into text field 'xpath=//input[contains(@placeholder,'รหัสผ่าน')]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg: Clicking element 'xpath=//button[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]'.
kw.arg: xpath=//button[contains(.,'เข้าสู่ระบบ')]
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.name: TC-003 ตรวจสอบการแจ้งเตือนหลังอัปเดตสถานะ

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Report ของคุณถูกปฏิเสธ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: รายงานเหตุการณ์ของคุณถูกปฏิเสธโดยผู้ดูแลระบบ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: เหตุผล: ไม่มีหลักฐานประกอบที่แนบมา ทำให้ข้อมูลไม่เพียงพอต่อการดำเนินการ
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.
